title: [PROJECT] Payment & Order Infrastructure
description: Enable customers to purchase fur hood replacements and store orders in a structured database ready for supplier relay

title: Set up Supabase database schema
description: Create Supabase tables: `orders` (id, created_at, stripe_payment_id, status enum [placed/confirmed/shipped/delivered], customer_email, shipping_address jsonb, product_tier, fur_color, fur_size, jacket_model, total_cad, notes), `inventory` (id, taobao_url, product_name_zh, product_name_en, color, pattern, size, price_cny, stock_available boolean, last_synced_at). Create RLS policies for admin-only write access. Add indexes on orders.status and inventory.stock_available. Store connection string in .env.local as SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.

title: Build Stripe checkout page at /checkout
description: Create app/checkout/page.tsx with form collecting: tier selection ($149/$199/$299 CAD radio buttons), shipping address fields (name, street, city, province, postal_code, country), jacket_model text input, fur_color dropdown (pulled from Supabase inventory.color where stock_available=true), fur_size dropdown (S/M/L). On submit, call /api/checkout/route.ts that creates Stripe checkout session with line items, success_url=/success?session_id={CHECKOUT_SESSION_ID}, cancel_url=/checkout. Use Stripe test mode. Store STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY in .env.local.

title: Implement Stripe webhook for order creation
description: Create app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts that handles checkout.session.completed events. Verify signature using STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Extract session metadata and insert row into Supabase orders table with status='placed', stripe_payment_id, customer email, shipping address (as jsonb), product details. Return 200 response. Test with Stripe CLI: `stripe listen --forward-to localhost:3000/api/webhooks/stripe`. Deploy webhook endpoint and register in Stripe dashboard.

title: Create order confirmation page at /success
description: Build app/success/page.tsx that reads session_id from URL params, fetches Stripe session details, queries Supabase for matching order by stripe_payment_id, displays order summary (order ID, items, shipping address, estimated delivery 2-3 weeks). Show 'Order confirmed! You'll receive tracking info via email.' message. Style with Tailwind v4. If session not found, redirect to homepage.

title: [PROJECT] Supplier Integration & Automation
description: Sync inventory from Taobao suppliers and auto-relay orders in Chinese format for seamless fulfillment

title: Build Taobao inventory scraper
description: Create scripts/taobao-scraper.ts using Playwright to scrape supplier Taobao listing pages. Extract: product name (zh + en translation via OpenAI), available colors, patterns, sizes, price in CNY, stock status from '有货/缺货' indicators, main product image URL. Parse HTML using cheerio. Store results in Supabase inventory table with last_synced_at timestamp. Run via `bun run scripts/taobao-scraper.ts`. Handle pagination and rate limiting (2s delay between requests). Log to console with success/error counts.

title: Implement Chinese order translation system
Set up automated supplier relay via email
description: Create app/api/orders/relay/route.ts POST endpoint that fetches order by ID, calls translate-order.ts, sends email to supplier via Resend with Chinese order text as plain text body, CC customer email for transparency. Use RESEND_API_KEY from env. Subject line: '新订单 #{order_id} - ArcticRuff'. Update order status to 'confirmed' in Supabase after send. Trigger this API via Supabase Database Webhooks on orders INSERT where status='placed'. Configure webhook in Supabase dashboard pointing to deployed API URL.

title: Create inventory sync cron job
description: Set up Vercel cron route at app/api/cron/sync-inventory/route.ts that runs daily at 3AM UTC. Call taobao-scraper logic, update Supabase inventory table, log sync results to Vercel logs. Protect route with CRON_SECRET header check. Add cron config to vercel.json: {"crons": [{"path": "/api/cron/sync-inventory", "schedule": "0 3 * * *"}]}. Test locally with curl and deploy. Monitor first 3 runs for errors.

title: [PROJECT] Operations & Analytics
description: Deploy admin dashboard for order management and implement notification + analytics systems for business monitoring

title: Build admin dashboard at /admin
description: Create app/admin/page.tsx protected by middleware checking ADMIN_PASSWORD cookie. Display tables: (1) Orders - all orders with columns for ID, date, tier, status, customer email, total CAD, actions (Update Status dropdown, Export CSV button). (2) Inventory - product variants with stock status, last sync time. (3) Revenue stats - total orders, total revenue CAD, breakdown by tier. Use Supabase client to fetch data. Style with Tailwind tables. Add login page at /admin/login that sets httpOnly cookie on correct password (ADMIN_PASSWORD from env).

title: Implement notification system
description: Create lib/notify.ts with two functions: (1) sendSlackNotification - posts to Slack webhook (SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL from env) with order details on new order. (2) sendCustomerEmail - uses Resend to send order confirmation email with order summary, tracking info placeholder, ArcticRuff branding. Call both functions from Stripe webhook handler after order creation. Include order ID, tier, total, customer name in Slack message. Use transactional email template with Resend. Test with real Stripe test checkout.

title: Add SEO and analytics
description: Update app/layout.tsx with: (1) GA4 script (NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID from env), (2) JSON-LD ProductSchema for each tier at homepage, (3) OpenGraph meta tags (title, description, image pointing to /og-image.png). Create public/sitemap.xml listing /, /checkout, /success. Create public/robots.txt allowing all. Add event tracking to checkout page: gtag('event', 'begin_checkout'), gtag('event', 'purchase') on success page. Verify in GA4 dashboard after deployment. Ensure all images have alt text.
